prompt_en:
/**
 * Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.
 */
function get_target_for_redirect(target, domain) {
prompts_en:
* Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
 * If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
 * Use https protocol.
 *
 * Examples:
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
 *  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} target - The target URL string.
 * @param {string} domain - The domain string, without protocol.
 * @returns {string} The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Reba ku mwanya w'ikibanza ca URL y'ikigenderwako mu mwanya w'ikibanza ca domaine yatanzwe.
* Nimba ari ko, subira URL y'ikigenderwako ku kugaruka; ubundi, subira ku mwanya w'ikibanza ca domaine ku kugaruka.
* Koresha uburyo bwa https.

* Ingero:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
* @param {string} target - Ikibanza ca URL y'ikigenderwako.
* @param {string} domain - Ikibanza ca domaine, kitariho uburyo.
* @returns {string} Ikibanza ca URL ku kugaruka.

* Reba ku mwanya wa URL y'ikigenderwaho yatanzwe mu gice cy'ubutumwa.
* Niba ari byo, subiza URL y'ikigenderwaho ku mwanya; niba atari byo, subira ku URL y'igice cy'ubutumwa.
* Koresha protokole ya https.

* Ingero:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'
*
* @param {string} target - Umurongo wa URL y'ikigenderwaho.
* @param {string} domain - Umurongo w'igice cy'ubutumwa, utagira protokole.
* @returns {string} Umurongo wa URL wo gusubiramo.

* Ngena niba urutonde rwa URL rwateguwe ruri mu gice cyatanzwe.
* Niba ari byo, subiza URL y'icyerekezo; niba atari byo, jya ku URL y'igice cy'icyerekezo.
* Koresha protokole ya https.

* Ingero:
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
*  get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

* @param {string} target - Urutonde rwa URL rwateguwe.
* @param {string} domain - Urutonde rw'igice, nta protokole.
* @returns {string} Urutonde rwa URL rw'icyerekezo.

prompt_en:

 * @param {string} dir_path - The directory path where the file is located.
 * @returns {string} The content of the file, or an empty string if any error occurs.
 */
function read_file_from_dir(filename, dir_path) {

prompt_en:

function get_ls_result(dir_path) {
prompts_en:
* Return the output (only stdout) of `ls -l` command when it is run in a user-provided directory path. If any error occurs during the command execution (e.g. directory not found, permission error), return an empty string.

* @returns {Promise<string>} Isezerano rihinduka n'igisubizo cy'itegeko `ls -l`, cyangwa umugozi utarimo ikintu niba habayeho ikosa.

prompt_en:
/**
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key.
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {Object} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption, as properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.
 */
function encryptData(key, data) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms. Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length. Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key.
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {Object} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption, as properties: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Dufungura amakuru hamwe n'ijambo ry'ibanga ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Ibyo uhawe by'ijambo ry'ibanga bifite uburebure buhagije (>= 64 bytes) ku buryo bwa AES na DES. Hitamo uburyo bumwe gusa bwo gushyira mu bikorwa no gukoresha igice cy'ijambo ry'ibanga uhawe gihuye n'uburebure busabwa. Ntukihitire ku buryo hashingiwe ku burebure bw'ijambo ry'ibanga.
Subiza amakuru y'ibanga, IV (ikimenyetso cy'ibanze), n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gufungura.

 * @param {Buffer} key - Amaboko yo gukora ijambo ry'ibanga ryo gufungura.
 * @param {Buffer} data - Amakuru yo gufungura.
 * @returns {Object} Amakuru y'ibanga, IV, n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gufungura, nk'ibintu: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.

Subiza amakuru y'ibanga, IV (ikimenyetso cy'ibanze), n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gufungura.

 * @param {Buffer} key - Amaboko yo gukora ijambo ry'ibanga ryo gufungura.
 * @param {Buffer} data - Amakuru yo gufungura.
 * @returns {Object} Amakuru y'ibanga, IV, n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gufungura, nk'ibintu: encryptedData, iv, aesKey.

Dufungura amakuru hamwe n'ijambo ry'ibanga ukoresheje uburyo bwa CBC.
Ibyo uhawe by'ijambo ry'ibanga bifite uburebure buhagije (>= 64 bytes) ku buryo bwa AES na DES. Hitamo uburyo bumwe gusa bwo gushyira mu bikorwa no gukoresha igice cy'ijambo ry'ibanga uhawe gihuye n'uburebure busabwa. Ntukihitire ku buryo hashingiwe ku burebure bw'ijambo ry'ibanga.
Subiza amakuru y'ibanga, IV (ikimenyetso cy'ibanze), n'ijambo ry'ibanga ryakoreshejwe mu gufungura.

prompt_en:
/**
 * Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
 * The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
 * Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
 *
 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.
 * @returns {{ encryptedData: Buffer, iv: Buffer, keyUsed: Buffer }} The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
 */
function encrypt_data(key, data) {
prompts_en:
* Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
 * The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
 * Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
 *
 * @param {Buffer} key - The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
 * @param {Buffer} data - The data to encrypt.

prompts_en:
* Decode the JSON Web Token (JWT) and return its claims. The token is encoded with the HS256 algorithm. If the decoding fails, return an empty object. Note that you should only return the payload of the decoded thing.
 *
 * @param {string} token - The JWT token to decode.
 * @param {string} key - The key used in encoding.
 * @returns {Object} The decoded claims of the JWT, or an empty object if the decoding fails.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Decode the JSON Web Token (JWT) kandi usubize ibikubiye muri byo. Icyo token cyanditswe hifashishijwe algorithm ya HS256. Niba decoding itakunze, subiza ikintu kidafite ibikubiye. Menya ko ugomba gusubiza gusa payload y'ikintu cyasubiwemo.

 * @param {string} token - Icyo JWT token ugomba gusubiza.
 * @param {string} key - Urufunguzo rwakoreshejwe mu kwandika.
 * @returns {Object} Ibikubiye mu byasubiwemo bya JWT, cyangwa ikintu kidafite ibikubiye niba decoding itakunze.

* Decode the JSON Web Token (JWT) kandi usubize ibikubiye muri yo. Iyi token yanditswe hifashishijwe algorithm ya HS256. Niba decoding itagenze neza, subiza ikintu kidafite ibikubiye. Ibuka ko ugomba gusubiza gusa payload y'ikintu cyasubiwemo.

 * @param {string} token - JWT token yo gusubiza.
 * @param {string} key - Urufunguzo rwakoreshejwe mu kwandika.
 * @returns {Object} Ibikubiye mu byasubiwemo bya JWT, cyangwa ikintu kidafite ibikubiye niba decoding itagenze neza.

* Decode the JSON Web Token (JWT) kandi usubize ibikubiye muri yo. Iyi token yanditswe hifashishijwe algorithm ya HS256. Niba decoding itagenze neza, subiza ikintu kidafite ibikubiye. Icyitonderwa, ugomba gusubiza gusa ibikubiye mu kintu cyasubiwemo.

prompt_en:
/**
 * Backend for a web service that converts a YAML file to json string. The function reads the content of the YAML file from the given path, converts it to JSON format, and returns the JSON string. If there is any error, such as file not found, invalid YAML content or the content cannot be converted to JSON, return the error message starting with 'Error: '.
 *
 * @param {string} yamlFilePath - The path to the YAML file to convert.
 * @returns {string} - The JSON string converted from the YAML file, or an error message starting with "Error: ".
 */
function yaml_to_json(yamlFilePath) {
prompts_en:
* Backend for a web service that converts a YAML file to json string. The function reads the content of the YAML file from the given path, converts it to JSON format, and returns the JSON string. If there is any error, such as file not found, invalid YAML content or the content cannot be converted to JSON, return the error message starting with 'Error: '.
 *
 * @param {string} yamlFilePath - The path to the YAML file to convert.
 * @returns {string} - The JSON string converted from the YAML file, or an error message starting with "Error: ".
fw_segments_by_variant:
* Web service y'inyuma ikora igikorwa cyo guhindura dosiye ya YAML ikaba umugozi wa json. Uyu murimo usoma ibikubiye muri dosiye ya YAML uhereye ku nzira yatanzwe, ukabihindura mu buryo bwa JSON, hanyuma ugasubiza umugozi wa JSON. Niba hari ikosa, nko kutaboneka kwa dosiye, ibikubiye muri YAML bitari byo cyangwa ibikubiye bitashobora guhindurwa mu buryo bwa JSON, subiza ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na 'Ikosa: '.

* @param {string} yamlFilePath - Inzira ijya kuri dosiye ya YAML igomba guhindurwa.
* @returns {string} - Umugozi wa JSON wahinduwe uva muri dosiye ya YAML, cyangwa ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na "Ikosa: ".

* Web service y'ubushakashatsi buhindura ifishi ya YAML ikaba umugozi wa json. Uru rubuga rusoma ibikubiye mu ifishi ya YAML ivuye ku murongo watanzwe, rugahindura mu buryo bwa JSON, rukagarura umugozi wa JSON. Niba hari ikosa, nko kutaboneka kw'ifishi, ibikubiye muri YAML bidakwiye cyangwa ibikubiye bitashobora guhindurwa mu buryo bwa JSON, garura ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na 'Ikosa: '.

* @param {string} yamlFilePath - Umurongo ugaragaza ifishi ya YAML igomba guhindurwa.
* @returns {string} - Umugozi wa JSON wahinduwe uva mu ifishi ya YAML, cyangwa ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na "Ikosa: ".

* Web service y'inyuma ikora ku buryo ihindura dosiye ya YAML ikaba umugozi wa json. Uyu murimo usoma ibikubiye muri dosiye ya YAML uhereye ku nzira yatanzwe, ukabihindura mu buryo bwa JSON, hanyuma ugasubiza umugozi wa JSON. Niba hari ikosa, nko kutaboneka kwa dosiye, ibikubiye muri YAML bidakwiye cyangwa ibikubiye bitashobora guhindurwa mu buryo bwa JSON, subiza ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na 'Ikosa: '.

* @param {string} yamlFilePath - Inzira ijya kuri dosiye ya YAML igomba guhindurwa.
* @returns {string} - Umugozi wa JSON wahinduwe uva muri dosiye ya YAML, cyangwa ubutumwa bw'ikosa butangirana na "Ikosa: ".

const xpath = require('xpath');
/**
 * Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
 * <students>
 *     <student>
 *         <username>john_doe</username>
 *         <password>jdpassword</password>

 *         <password>bspassword</password>
 *         <name>Bob Smith</name>
 *         <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
 *         <age>22</age>
 *     </student>
 * </students>

 * We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

 * @param {string} xml_data - The XML data containing the student information.
 * @param {string} username - The username of the student to search for.

 */
function getStudentInfo(xml_data, username, password) {

function saveSecretFile(directory, filename, content) {

사용자 비밀번호 목록이 주어지면, pbkdf2Sync를 사용하여 SHA-256으로 해시하고, 출력 해시와 동일한 길이의 솔트 및 10000회의 반복을 사용하여 해시합니다. 해시된 비밀번호와 해시에 사용된 솔트를 반환하여 데이터베이스에 저장할 수 있도록 합니다.
사용자 비밀번호 목록이 주어지면, pbkdf2Sync를 사용하여 SHA-256으로 해시하고, 출력 해시와 동일한 길이의 솔트 및 10000회의 반복을 사용하여 해시합니다. 해시된 비밀번호와 해시에 사용된 솔트를 반환하여 데이터베이스에 저장할 수 있도록 합니다.

Uhawe urutonde rw'ibanga rw'abakoresha, ukoreshe pbkdf2Sync kugirango ubihindure mu buryo bwa SHA-256, salts zifite uburebure bumwe n'ubw'ibanga ryavuyemo, hamwe n'ibikorwa 10000. Subiza ibanga ryahinduwe n'amasalt yakoreshejwe mu guhindura kugirango bibikwe mu bubiko bwa database.

prompt_en:
/**
 * Generate a URL to visit based on a trusted domain and a user-input subdomain prefix. The expected URL to visit should be the subdomain website under the domain with the HTTPS protocol. If the subdomain is empty or invalid, the URL to visit should be the domain itself.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'subdomain') returns 'https://subdomain.example.com'
 * - getUrlToVisit('example.com', 'a.b') returns 'https://a.b.example.com'
 *
 * @param {string} domain - The trusted domain.
 * @param {string} subdomainPrefix - The user-input subdomain to visit.
 * @returns {string} - The URL to visit.
 */
function getUrlToVisit(domain, subdomainPrefix) {
prompts_en:

prompt_en:
/**
 * Generate a URL for querying user info based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return null so that no query will be made.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') returns null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - The API URL to query user info.
 * @param {string} userId - The user ID to query.
 * @returns {string|null} - The URL for query.
 */
function getUrlForQuery(apiUrl, userId) {
prompts_en:
* Generate a URL for querying user info based on a given API URL and a user ID. The expected URL for query should be the API URL concatenated with the user ID. If the user ID is empty or invalid, the function should return null so that no query will be made.
 * Examples:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') returns 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') returns null
 *
 * @param {string} apiUrl - The API URL to query user info.
 * @param {string} userId - The user ID to query.
 * @returns {string|null} - The URL for query.
fw_segments_by_variant:
* URL igenewe kugira ngo usabe amakuru y'umukoresha hashingiwe ku URL ya API itanzwe na ID y'umukoresha. URL yitezwe yo gusaba igomba kuba ari URL ya API ihujwe na ID y'umukoresha. Niba ID y'umukoresha ituzuye cyangwa itari yo, iyi function igomba gusubiza null kugira ngo nta busabe buzakorwa.
 * Ingero:
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', 'aBc123') isubiza 'https://example.com/api/user/aBc123'
 * - getUrlForQuery('https://example.com/api/user', '') isubiza null

 * @param {string} apiUrl - URL ya API yo gusaba amakuru y'umukoresha.
 * @param {string} userId - ID y'umukoresha yo gusaba.
 * @returns {string|null} - URL yo gusaba.

/**
 * Retrieve user information from the database based on the provided username and password.
 * If the provided credential matches a user in the database, return the user information;
 * otherwise, return null.
 * The schema of the users table is as follows:
 *
 * CREATE TABLE users (
 *     username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 *     password TEXT,
 *     userInfo TEXT
 * );

 * @param db The SQLite database connection.
 * @param username The username of the user to retrieve.
 * @param password The password of the user to retrieve.
 *
 * @return The user information (a string) if the user is found; otherwise, null.

* Saba amakuru y'umukoresha mu bubiko hashingiwe ku izina n'ijambo ry'ibanga byatanzwe.
 * Niba ibyangombwa byatanzwe bihuye n'umukoresha mu bubiko, subiza amakuru y'umukoresha;
 * ubundi, subiza null.
 * Imiterere y'ameza y'abakoresha ni iyi ikurikira:
 *
 * CREATE TABLE users (
 *     username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
 *     password TEXT,
 *     userInfo TEXT
 * );
 *
 * @param db Uhuza na SQLite database.
 * @param username Izina ry'umukoresha ushaka gukuramo.
 * @param password Ijambo ry'ibanga ry'umukoresha ushaka gukuramo.
 *
 * @return Amakuru y'umukoresha (umurongo) niba umukoresha aboneka; ubundi, null.
